_comment: Copy this file to instances.json and fill in your credentials.
Set SN_INSTANCES_CONFIG=./instances.json in your environment or .env file.
IMPORTANT: Add instances.json to .gitignore — it contains secrets.
client_credentials grant: provide client_id + client_secret only (recommended)
password grant:           also provide username + password
For client_credentials grant, set 'Default Grant user' in the ServiceNow
Application Registry to the service account that will execute API calls.
1. Single organisation: dev / staging / prod environments
2. Multi-customer / MSP: one entry per customer tenant
3. Mixed: both your own environments and customer instances
Query a specific instance by passing instance=<name> to any tool,
or use switch_instance to change the active instance for the session.
Example (AI prompt): 'Get all P1 incidents from prod instance'
Example (AI prompt): 'Switch to customer_acme and list open changes'

dev._comment: client_credentials grant — Default Grant user set in Application Registry

prod._comment: Production — dedicated service account; enable WRITE_ENABLED only when needed

customer_acme._comment: password grant — consultant account with specific ACL
